meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Setup to Master Debugging
content.seo_description: Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup and overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-friendly roadmap using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: Debugging is the primary barrier for student developers. By integrating Claude Code into your local environment and leveraging Antigravity for architectural oversight, you transform your terminal into a senior-level pair programmer. This setup automates root-cause analysis, allowing you to resolve complex errors while learning the underlying logic behind every fix.
content.intro:
You are staring at a terminal screen glowing with a wall of red stack traces. The silence of your dorm room is broken only by the hum of your laptop, and the frustration is mounting—you know the logic is sound, but the implementation is failing. This is the rite of passage every engineer faces: the invisible wall between a working prototype and a broken build.

But what if you had a senior engineer sitting beside you, ready to dissect the error, explain the nuance, and provide the fix in real-time? Claude Code is that engineer. By mastering this setup, you stop fighting your tools and start building your vision. Let’s turn that frustration into your greatest competitive advantage.

steps.title: Initialize Claude Code in Your Project
steps.description: Establish a secure connection between your local environment and Anthropic’s API to enable intelligent code analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify potential areas where debugging logic often fails for beginners.

steps.title: Configure Environmental Context
steps.description: Provide Claude with the necessary context to understand your specific framework, library dependencies, and project scope.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudeprompt file that defines my project's coding standards and common debugging patterns.

steps.title: Isolate the Error with Terminal Logs
steps.description: Capture the specific stack trace output to give Claude the raw data required for precise troubleshooting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the logic error in the following stack trace and suggest a refactor that follows clean code principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze the error in the latest terminal output log'

steps.title: Execute Automated Fixes
steps.description: Allow Claude Code to propose and apply structural changes to your files while maintaining version control integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a plan to fix the identified bugs without introducing regressions in existing modules.

steps.title: Verify Through Unit Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix works by running tests directly through the Claude interface, confirming the solution is robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the newly fixed module to prevent future regressions.

pro_tips: Always run 'claude status' before starting a session to ensure the model has indexed your latest changes.
Use custom .claudeprompt files to force the AI to explain the 'why' behind a fix, turning every debug session into a learning lesson.
Pipe your build errors directly into Claude using the CLI to avoid manual copy-pasting and potential context loss.
Treat Claude Code as a teaching assistant: ask it to 'explain this error like I am a junior dev' to deepen your understanding.
Regularly commit your code before triggering 'claude fix' to maintain a clean git history for your student portfolio.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, deploy your app to a provider like Vercel or Railway and document your process in your portfolio to showcase your problem-solving workflow.
content.conversion_block: You now have the power to debug like a senior engineer. Stop guessing and start building with precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
